docs.title: Enterprise AI Integration
docs.text:
Phase 04 added 10 autonomous engines:

Engine Purpose Decision Engine 9 autonomous classification rules Runtime Orchestrator State machine, queue, parallel, retry, rollback Validation Engine 12 domains, BLOCKER/HIGH/MEDIUM gates Self Learning Pattern analyzer, feedback loop Dashboard Real-time health monitoring API Contracts 10 internal APIs
